Home Page 3

message.reasoning_content:
We need to generate stage web-003-chain-link: create page-3.html and link it back to page-2, while preserving existing page-1 and page-2 links. Existing files: site/index.html (with link to page-2), site/page-2.html (with link back to index). We need to add page-3.html and modify page-2.html to include a link to page-3 (preserving existing link to index). Also ensure page-3 links back to page-2. Also ensure page-1 (index) still links to page-2 (unchanged). So we need to modify page-2.html to add a link to page-3 in its navigation (or elsewhere) while preserving existing link to index. Also need to create page-3.html with link back to page-2. Validators: page-3-links-page-2 (link integrity) and previous-links-preserved (link integrity). So page-3 must link to page-2, and page-2 must still link to index (previous link). Also page-2 must link to page-3 (maybe not required but likely). The validator "previous-links-preserved" likely checks that existing links from previous stage (page-2 linking to index) are still present. So we must not remove that link. Thus modify site/page-2.html: add a link to page-3.html somewhere, maybe in nav after Home link. Keep Home. Add Page 3. Ensure HTML valid. Create site/page-3.html: include navigation linking back to page-2.html (maybe also link to home? Not required). At least link to page-2. Thus output JSON with two files: modified page-2.html and new page-3.html. No need to modify index.html. Make sure content strings are escaped correctly. Let's craft page-2.html content: Page 2
Home Page 3

Page 2

This is the second page, linked back to the home page.

Make sure indentation consistent. Now page-3.html: Page 3
Page 2

Page 3

This is the third page, linked back to page 2.

Now produce JSON: { "files": [ { "path": "site/page-2.html", "content": "..."}, { "path": "site/page-3.html", "content": "..."} ], "notes": "Added page-3 linking to page-2 and updated page-2 to include link to page-3 while preserving link to home." } Make sure to escape double quotes inside content. Use \n for newlines. Let's construct content strings. For page-2.html content string: "\n\n\n \n \n \n Page 2\n\n\n
\n Home\n Page 3\n
\n
\n

Page 2

\n

This is the second page, linked back to the home page.

\n
\n\n" Similarly page-3.html: "\n\n\n \n \n \n Page 3\n\n\n
\n Page 2\n
\n
\n

Page 3

\n

This is the third page, linked back to page 2.

\n
\n\n" Now produce final JSON.
